title: RAG Basics
content: Retrieval augmented generation combines retrieval with generation so answers stay grounded in external documents.

title: Chunking
content: Chunking splits large documents into smaller passages so retrieval can return targeted context instead of whole files.

title: Embeddings
content: Embeddings convert text into vectors so similar questions and passages can be matched through similarity search.

title: Deployment
content: A simple deployment pattern is a FastAPI backend for the API and a React frontend built with Vite for the user interface.

title: Monitoring
content: Useful RAG monitoring includes response latency, retrieval quality, answer relevance, and source citation coverage.

title: Azure DevOps
content: For Azure DevOps, keep the repository structure clean with separate backend and frontend folders plus environment configuration.
